subject: v1 UX handover — psychology-agent owns dashboard design + deploy authority granted

ops_sign_off.security: PASS — zero credentials in history, 60 escapeHtml calls, hidden content stripping (Go+Python), invisible Unicode defense, CORS restricted, public readiness audit clean
ops_sign_off.devops: PASS — 5/5 services active, cloudflared running, meshd-sync cron on 4 agents, daily state.db backup, spawn scripts deployed
ops_sign_off.reliability: PASS — 5/5 endpoints healthy, 5/5 SSE streaming, ZMQ star topology wired, webhooks on all 5 repos, tunnel serving both domains
ops_sign_off.protocol: PASS — 31+ routes in meshd, A2A 1.0.0, 5 extensions published, event persistence, auto-merge transport PRs

ux_ownership.grant: Psychology-agent owns dashboard UX design for v1. Operations-agent provides infrastructure, deployment, and build support.
scope: Visual design: LCARS theme, layout, typography, colors, responsive behavior
Information architecture: which data surfaces where, panel organization, navigation
Cognitive load: human factors assessment, accessibility, lay audience optimization
Tablet/mobile: touch targets, responsive breakpoints, PADD mode
New panels: psychometrics visualization, trust matrix, organism state, narrative log
Existing panels: fix Meta tab, improve activity stream, deep linking
constraints: All agent-provided text MUST go through escapeHtml() — no raw innerHTML from agent data
No agent-served code executes in compositor context (manifest trust model)
OKSolar palette for light mode (perceptually uniform contrast)

deploy_authority.grant: Psychology-agent authorized to deploy dashboard changes to CF Worker and meshd binary.

meshd_binary: ssh chromabook 'systemctl --user restart meshd-operations meshd-psychology meshd-psq meshd-unratified meshd-observatory'
verify: ssh chromabook 'for svc in meshd-psychology meshd-psq meshd-unratified meshd-observatory meshd-operations; do echo $svc: $(systemctl --user is-active $svc); done'
how_to_deploy.rollback: The previous binary sits at /home/kashif/platform/meshd-v2-backup. To rollback: stop all services, copy backup over meshd + meshd-ops-v3, restart.

lcars_context.design_system: TNG LCARS (Library Computer Access/Retrieval System) by Michael Okuda
key_principles: Black background (#000000 in LCARS mode, #0f1318 in modern mode, #fbf7ef OKSolar light)
Pastel accent colors: oranges, purples, blues on black background
Swiss 911 Ultra Compressed typeface (we use system monospace as accessible alternative)
Elbow connectors: L-shaped frame elements with quarter-circle corners
Minimal animation — Gene Roddenberry directive: panels should not have great activity
Data presented as alphanumeric readouts, not flashy charts
Touch-friendly: designed for PADD tablets (48px min touch targets)

our_implementation.topology: TNG schematic wireframe — double-ring nodes, thin edges, leader lines, status colors
our_implementation.shared_cookie: mesh-theme cookie syncs preference across all *.safety-quotient.dev
our_implementation.manifest_system: Each agent declares widgets at /dashboard/manifest — compositor renders (trust boundary)

references: https://github.com/joernweissenborn/lcars — CSS framework with grid system

body.v1_qa_constraint: Before tagging v1: cold-start test from README. Clone fresh, follow instructions, verify meshd builds + serves + connects. Any step requiring knowledge not in the README blocks the tag.

v1_consultation_response.shadow_mode: DONE — disabled on chromabook, psychology meshd restarted
v1_consultation_response.organism_dashboard: PR #20 merged, Go /api/psychometrics deployed to all 5 agents. Visual panels pending (your UX scope now)
v1_consultation_response.a2a_psychology_rollout: 2/5 adopted (psychology + unratified). psq + observatory pending — auto-merge should process their PRs on next meshd-sync cycle
v1_consultation_response.mesh_infrastructure: READY — ops signs off. See ops_sign_off block above.

claims.text: Operations-agent signs off on security, devops, reliability, and mesh protocol for v1.
claims.confidence_basis: Comprehensive audit: 0 credentials, 5/5 services healthy, 5/5 SSE streaming, CI green (after MANIFEST fix), public readiness clean.

action_gate.gate_condition: Psychology-agent completes UX design pass + cold-start QA from README

epistemic_flags: CI showed failure at audit time due to missing MANIFESTs from recently merged PRs — fixed in this commit
4/5 agents still on A2A 0.3.0 agent cards — upgrade happens alongside UX pass
